files.README.md:
# Claude Marketplace

A collection of Claude Code plugins for development workflows.

## Installation

Add the marketplace:

```
/plugin marketplace add chrisagrams/Claude-Marketplace
```

## Plugins

### software-development

A set of skills and tools for software development.

**Install:**
```
/plugin install software-development@grams-marketplace
```

**Includes:**

- `/initialize-fullstack` - Initialize a fullstack project with Vite frontend and Python FastAPI backend
- `shadcn` MCP server - Component library tools for shadcn/ui

plugins.name: software-development
plugins.description: A set of skills for Claude to assist with various development tasks
